actions.text: (-white)Research and place 2 [res://textures/blocks/resource extractors/Impact Drill/ImpactDrillComplete.png]Impact Drills to extract[res://textures/resources/zinc.png]Zinc.
(-white)Now place a[res://textures/blocks/factories/Brass Mixer/BrassMixerComplete.png]Brass Mixer and supply it zinc and copper to produce  [res://textures/TexNotFound.png](-gold)Brass
